config.name: Reserve Stress — Stressed (shock=0.015)
config.hypothesis: Under stressed conditions (shock=0.015), reserve hoarding begins to outperform deployment as shock recovery demands liquidity buffers

findings: Optimal treasury threshold by fitness: 0.60 (mean fitness: 0.5565) at shock=0.015
Peak population stability at threshold = 0.20 (mean pop: 48.1)
Treasury ratio: 0.0008 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.0008 at hoarding (0.90)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean catastrophe deaths: 5.8 at deployment vs 5.9 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.57 at deployment vs 6.82 at hoarding
